title: Date announced for Moving On Music's Jam Jar Series
heroAlt: Date announced for Moving On Music's Jam Jar Series

heroImages.alt: Date announced for Moving On Music's Jam Jar Series

bodyHtml: We're crossing the border on the 5th of October for our first ever Northern Ireland show. We've long been fans of Moving On Music and their brilliant programming, so very chuffed indeed to be invited to play on their The Jam Jar Series - alongside such good company too!
